items.title: Essential launch — Dependencies
items.summary: Fill Dependencies section on launch doc with named owners: Eng, Design, Legal, CS, integrations.
items.nextAction: Ping each function for one line + ticket link per dependency.

items.title: Essential — GTM foundation
items.summary: One-pager (problem, buyer, outcome, proof); align marketing + sales on Essential vs future tiers + ICP; outline deck/web narrative before GA.
items.nextAction: Draft one-pager skeleton, then schedule alignment with marketing + sales.

items.title: Essential launch — ICPs
items.summary: Add ideal customer profiles to launch narrative and GTM.
items.nextAction: List 2–3 ICP segments with pains, buying triggers, and anti-ICP.

items.title: Essential — PRD/AC catch-up
items.summary: Fold federated remote app (Air) / PDF payslip path and WhatsApp into formal PRD + acceptance criteria where missing.
items.nextAction: Gap-review PRD index vs launch scope; open AC updates per PRD.

items.title: Elevated auth — follow-through
items.summary: Workshop core vs remote app split and validation; Tanya docs → Pieter review per elevated auth meeting.
items.nextAction: Schedule workshop; track doc handoff to Pieter.

items.title: Essential launch — migration execution
items.summary: Owners per cohort, cutover criteria, steering cadence — aligned to migration roadmap and end-May kickoff.
items.nextAction: Name owner per Q2 pilot account; confirm steering forum.

items.title: Essential — stakeholder RACI
items.summary: Populate stakeholder table on launch doc with wiki links to Internal (and External) people pages.
items.nextAction: Map Steerco + workstream leads into RACI rows.

items.title: Pipeline data — PowerFlow → vault
items.summary: Export/sync so pipeline/deals file lands in repo when it changes; define folder, naming, and how you use it for planning.
items.nextAction: Pick vault folder + filename; verify PowerFlow trigger.

items.title: Calendar — O365 via Apple Calendar (Dex)
items.summary: Confirm work calendar syncs to Calendar.app; run /calendar-setup for fast local daily-plan queries.
items.nextAction: If calendar visible in Calendar.app, run calendar-setup script from dex-obsidian/calendar skill.

items.title: Essential — success metrics + review
items.summary: Define adoption, activation, support-load metrics and a review date.

items.title: Pre-GA — internal build readiness
items.summary: Align build complete (internal) with GA window; track blockers vs milestones.

items.title: GTM assets — web + deck
items.summary: Customer-facing narrative assets for GA milestone (complements one-pager / alignment).

items.title: Migration roadmap — validate € MRR
items.summary: Cross-check est. platform MRR in launch doc with finance and account owners.

items.title: Beta accounts — confirm before outreach
items.summary: G4S / Anglo noted as potential only — confirm before GTM or migration touch.

items.title: Wyzetalk Essential — scope narrative
items.summary: Elevator pitch, GA window, migration kickoff, full Requirements scope — captured on launch doc.
